notes: Light governance — single technical reviewer (standard-code-reviewer, opus) covering product/spec fit + technical correctness in one pass. Verdict APPROVE, no blockers. Sprint 2 delivers: (Wave A) Playwright canon-parity audit — 75 screenshots across 9 routes x 3 widths + 5 mockup oracles; parity-report.md with 23 drift items (2 P0 reclassified as audit artifacts, 11 P1, 10 P2); (Wave B) 5 surgical fixes — KPI colored variant (dashboard §02), AuthCard full-viewport at desktop (§01), contacts search placeholder (+@tg, §07), welcome-page emoji removal (§01c), plus register-page investigation note. Tokens verified real (bg-gaffer-pos-soft / bg-gaffer-neg-soft in tailwind.config.js:85-88 + globals.css:61-64). Blocked items: avgPaymentCycleDays and lastPayoutDate legitimately absent from GafferContact DTO — deferred to Sprint 3+ API work. Tests: API 755/755 (unchanged from Sprint 1 baseline), web 201/201 (unchanged), tsc web no new errors. Drift count after fixes: ~5 P1 (down from ~10), remainder out of surgical scope.
